title: Integrating spatial transcriptomics with single-cell transcriptomics reveals a spatiotemporal gene landscape of the human developing kidney.
author: Wu H Liu F Shangguan Y Yang Y Shi W Hu W Zeng Z Hu N Zhang X Hocher B Tang D Yin L Dai Y
content:
S-EPMC9164720 PMC9164720 Integrating spatial transcriptomics with single-cell transcriptomics reveals a spatiotemporal gene landscape of the human developing kidney.

Background

Research on spatiotemporal gene landscape can provide insights into the spatial characteristics of human kidney
